title: CPAP follow-up documentation

treatment_and_management.text: Supports tailored follow-up, CPAP review, annual review after optimisation, symptoms, Epworth score, vigilance and driving, AHI or ODI, adherence, treatment experience, sleep hygiene, and clinician-reviewed sleep-study follow-up.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports OSAHS treatment follow-up and monitoring for CPAP follow-up; no decision is generated.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports tailored follow-up, CPAP review, annual review after optimisation, symptoms, Epworth score, vigilance and driving, AHI or ODI, adherence, treatment experience, sleep hygiene, and clinician-reviewed sleep-study follow-up.

source.title: Obstructive sleep apnoea/hypopnoea syndrome and obesity hypoventilation syndrome in over 16s

medication.text: Supports tailored clinician discussion of weight, smoking, alcohol, sleep hygiene, and CPAP in recommendation-qualified diagnosed OSAHS contexts; no medicine, device setting, or autonomous treatment output is mapped.
medication.rationale: Supports clinician-led lifestyle and treatment discussion for CPAP follow-up; no decision is generated.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports tailored clinician discussion of weight, smoking, alcohol, sleep hygiene, and CPAP in recommendation-qualified diagnosed OSAHS contexts; no medicine, device setting, or autonomous treatment output is mapped.

source.title: Obstructive sleep apnoea/hypopnoea syndrome and obesity hypoventilation syndrome in over 16s

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.4.1 and 1.5.1–1.6.7 — lifestyle and treatment discussion

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Diagnosis, device and settings, use, adherence data, mask fit, leak, symptoms, adverse effects, driving, comorbidity, clinician decision and plan remain absent.
No diagnosis, risk conclusion, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for CPAP follow-up.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
